body.title: Facia memory query pattern — Igor can find his facia nodes
body.result: Created memory_query.py with list_facia_memories and get_tool_registry_report tools. Seeded INTERP_FACIA_DISCOVERY memory explaining facia query pattern and PROC_QUERY_FACIA habit (fires on 'what facia' intent). Igor can now query his own facia entry points. 567 tests pass. Commit: 1a36cbf1.
body.description: Igor has facia memories (INTERP_FACIA_* ID prefix, INTERPRETIVE type, narrative starts with 'Tool:') but doesn't know the naming convention to query them. Confirmed in DB: INTERP_FACIA_ADD_INTERPRETIVE_EDGE, INTERP_FACIA_ANALYZE_WORD_GRAPH etc. Fix: (1) seed INTERPRETIVE memory explaining facia naming convention (id LIKE 'INTERP_FACIA_%', or memory_search('facia')), (2) optionally add list_facia_memories tool.
